elements.value: Payment Terms: Invoice must be paid within 25 days from the issue date.

Quotation Validity: This quotation remains valid until November 30, 2030.
Warranty: Hardware includes a standard 6-month warranty.
Shipping Policy: Shipping fees may vary based on destination.
